---
title: "Redwood to Richmond (24% Gravel)"
---

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
  const title = document.querySelector(".quarto-title h1.title");
  if (!title) {
    return;
  }
  title.innerHTML = title.textContent.replace(
    /(\d+% Gravel)/g,
    '<span style="color: chocolate;">$1</span>',
  );
});
</script>
```



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="San Leandro" data-miles="38.61" data-elevation="3685.86" data-time="271" data-road-quality="76" data-has-gravel="true">
<div class="mobile-route-heading">

<div class="mobile-route-tags"><span class="mobile-route-tag">Lake Chabot</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Redwood Road ↑</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Seaview ↓</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Meadows Canyon ↓</span><span class="mobile-route-tag">Wildcat Creek ↓</span></div>
</div>
<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/big-redwood-to-tilden/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>San Leandro</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>38.61</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>3685.86 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~4:30</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>1.28 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#91cf60;">76%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Map

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/big-redwood-to-tilden/overview_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/big-redwood-to-tilden/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>19.08</td>
      <td>49.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>6.02</td>
      <td>16.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>5.04</td>
      <td>13.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>3.81</td>
      <td>10.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>3.38</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>1.28</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/big-redwood-to-tilden/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,894</td>
      <td>11.6</td>
      <td>112 ± 54</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Lake Chabot Road (7% avg)</td>
      <td>236</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Walnut Road (5% avg)</td>
      <td>292</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Redwood Road (5% avg)</td>
      <td>577</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>22 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Redwood Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>605</td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>24 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Skyline Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>325</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Skyline Boulevard (3% avg)</td>
      <td>197</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>10 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>502</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>17 ± 9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Seaview Trail (7% avg)</td>
      <td>111</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Meadows Canyon Trail (1% avg)</td>
      <td>49</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>2,894</td>
      <td>38.7</td>
      <td>271 ± 108</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Lake Chabot Road (7% avg)</td>
      <td>236</td>
      <td>0.7</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.5</td>
      <td>14</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2. Walnut Road (5% avg)</td>
      <td>292</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>12 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.2</td>
      <td>11</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3. Redwood Road (5% avg)</td>
      <td>577</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
      <td>22 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>24</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4. Redwood Road (4% avg)</td>
      <td>605</td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>24 ± 10</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5. Skyline Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>325</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
      <td>11 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>3.4</td>
      <td>21</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6. Skyline Boulevard (3% avg)</td>
      <td>197</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>10 ± 5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7. Grizzly Peak Boulevard (6% avg)</td>
      <td>502</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
      <td>17 ± 9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8. Seaview Trail (7% avg)</td>
      <td>111</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>2.7</td>
      <td>14</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9. Meadows Canyon Trail (1% avg)</td>
      <td>49</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>3 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>7.5</td>
      <td>49</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/big-redwood-to-tilden/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allow="fullscreen"
  webkitallowfullscreen
  mozallowfullscreen
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>15.6</td>
      <td>40.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>9.4</td>
      <td>24.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>5.1</td>
      <td>13.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>4.5</td>
      <td>11.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>3.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>1.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.1</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>1.1</td>
      <td>2.8</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
